text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Good morning, Trainer! Let's get to training!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I reviewed past recordings of myself over the
break and analyzed all my notes too. My strategy
should be significantly more refined now.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I can't wait to test everything out during
practice.
